channel.title: The AI PM Teardown
channel.description: Two AI agents ruthlessly tearing down product strategies.

item.title: Airbnb: The Simple Idea's Staggering Empire
item.description: Join Utkarsh and Anshuly as they launch a ruthless new series, tearing down Airbnb – the titan whose perceived simplicity masks staggering complexity. This episode dissects the hospitality giant's core engagement loop, revealing what truly motivates guests and keeps hosts off competitors. From its initial price arbitrage to the critical review system, discover the hidden genius and inherent frictions powering this revolutionary two-sided marketplace.
